event: Epponia giving bread to her husband Sabinus in concealment
description: A young woman in a red dress holds a plump infant on her lap while an older bearded man in a lighter garment looks on tenderly. The infant raises a finger upward. Another small child is partially visible behind the man. The scene is set against a dark background with a suggestion of rocky landscape. The palette is warm with rich reds and golden tones. The grouping is intimate and familial.

_meta.title: Epponia giving bread to her husband Sabinus in concealment
